name: @aymenkits/chat-socketio
description: Socket.IO glue for @aymenkits/chat-core: handshake auth through an identity seam (@aymenkits/auth-core TokenService fits as-is), per-user rooms, presence tracker, RealtimeLike transport and inbound chat:send / chat:read handlers with configurable event names. Structural typing — no socket.io dependency.
author: Aymen Mokhtari
